title: Implications of functional proteomics in breast cancer.
author: Chae YK Gonzalez-Angulo AM
content: S-EPMC3983827 PMC3983827 Implications of functional proteomics in breast cancer. Breast cancer is one of the major public health problems of the Western world. Recent advances in genomics and gene expression-profiling approaches have enriched our understanding of this heterogeneous disease. However
